title: Acid Bus Seat Hydra port over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: Acid Bus Seat's routed held-window side bus should drive far more visible motion pressure than the raw fixture baseline (observed ~+0.033 on ci-smoke.mp4; threshold set at +0.02 with margin)
the acid side-bus treatment should materially increase edge breakup and composited structure instead of collapsing into a flat tint

expectedVideo: the split-bus treatment should keep a dirty pixel-torn branch fighting the main line instead of collapsing into one blur
expectedAudio: the coupled sound should feel pushed by the internal bus branch rather than merely doubled
manualChecks: Does the cyan acid branch stay intentional and legible instead of muddying the whole frame?
